action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Compensation Review – [Your Name]

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to formally request a review of my current compensation package. Over the past [Number] years, I have had the opportunity to deepen my expertise in [Your Field/Role] and take on increasing responsibilities within the team.

Since my last salary adjustment, I have successfully [mention 1-2 specific major achievements, e.g., led the X project resulting in Y% cost savings, mentored Z new hires, or streamlined process A which improved efficiency]. These contributions have directly supported our department's goals and the company's broader objectives. Given my expanded scope of work and the value I continue to deliver, I believe it is an appropriate time to discuss adjusting my salary to reflect my current level of performance and market standards for similar roles.

I am fully committed to the success of our team and look forward to continuing to drive results. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss this matter further at your earliest convenience. Please let me know if there is a specific time this week or next that works best for you.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have attached a brief summary of my key metrics and achievements from the last fiscal year to provide additional context for our discussion.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
